FACTODUE OF SLOTASOR

Tro underaigned, ALrIANO QUIRINO, PRESIDIAT OF TIM

RAN LUCIAN GOLIA, AVOI SNTIAOMDIRAIS NOd ARNISTIA PLANTIO

INATIANI ON 1NG VIaNO IsUZIO, duty enthartead by thelo

of Islandatio, patrera the Hopaalla of the Pellppines aud lão Prosas Nogsalle, eleced el Marte an dona 86, 1967, ande harine carefully sempared tinda inscranto el ratitlanties of the tranty of tilendates, fores to do is good and due

Roma, bare as thie dato essbangad sho sell liatrisanto of ratistoattoo, tbo Baray Antraardinary and Hintoter Piestpon tentlary of the provos Napualle naictay it of racord that ho vlli tafara ilo dorarreras of she roastrattoo made la tha
